spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)' and related imports.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.general_idea: Migrated JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Update Spring Test context configuration to use the JUnit 5 extension instead of the JUnit 4 runner.
Replace deprecated PageRequest constructor with the static factory method PageRequest.of().
Replace deprecated Sort constructor with the static factory method Sort.by() and fluent order builders.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: new Sort(new Sort.Order(...)) -> Sort.by(new Sort.Order(...)) or Sort.by(Sort.Order.asc(...))

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Hamcrest assertion import to use the explicit MatcherAssert class for clarity.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat -> import static org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Refactor variable declarations and indentation to follow modern Java coding conventions.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: Moved variable declarations closer to usage; fixed indentation of annotations and methods.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data Neo4j OGM annotations with the new Spring Data Neo4j 6+ schema annotations.
Switch from OGM's @GraphId to the new @Id and @GeneratedValue annotations for identifier management.
Change the relationship type string from lowercase to uppercase to align with Neo4j conventions.
Remove the @Index annotation as indexing is now handled via schema definitions or repository methods in the new driver.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation to clean up code.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line definitions for brevity.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replaced deprecated GraphRepository with Neo4jRepository to align with Spring Data Neo4j 6+ API.
Updated import for @Query annotation to the new package location in Spring Data Neo4j 6+.
Rewrote Cypher query from legacy START/MATCH syntax to modern pattern matching syntax.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Switch from Spring's JUnit 4 runner to the JUnit 5 extension for test context management.
Replace deprecated Neo4j OGM template API with the newer Neo4jClient API for query execution.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: neo4jClient.query("CREATE INDEX ... IF NOT EXISTS ... FOR (u:User) ON (u.login)").run();

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update repository method calls to use Optional return types introduced in Spring Data Commons.
Refactor JUnit assertions to use the message-as-last-argument style preferred in JUnit 5.
Remove obsolete comments, debug print statements, and unused imports to clean up the test class.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: removed out("Root id: " + rootId); and private static void out(Object o)

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate from the deprecated Neo4j OGM (Object-Graph Mapper) to the modern Bolt driver-based Spring Data Neo4j configuration.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Replaced `extends Neo4jConfiguration` with `extends AbstractNeo4jConfig` and swapped `getSessionFactory()` for a `driver()` bean returning `GraphDatabase.driver()`.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Remove the embedded/in-process Neo4j server configuration in favor of connecting to an external instance via Bolt.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Removed `neo4jServer()` method returning `InProcessServer` and associated imports.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the shift from OGM classes to Bolt driver and new Spring Data Neo4j config classes.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Replaced imports for `SessionFactory`, `Neo4jConfiguration`, `InProcessServer`, etc., with `AuthTokens`, `Driver`, `GraphDatabase`, and `AbstractNeo4jConfig`.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring integration.
Adjust argument order in assertions to match JUnit 5 API signature (expected, actual, message).

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring integration.
Adjust assertEquals and assertNotNull argument order to match JUnit 5 API signature.
Correct the error message for the full name assertion to accurately reflect the field being tested.
Remove trailing whitespace and normalize indentation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4 starter parent to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new framework version.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 21.
Include the new dedicated MongoDB driver module in the reactor build.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the target Java version.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the project parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom parent POM to centralize dependency management.
Renamed the Maven artifact ID from mongoboot to spring-boot-mongo for consistency.
Updated the project name and description fields in the POM.
Removed the explicit java.version property, likely relying on the new parent POM or default compiler settings.
Added a property to define the version of the docker-maven-plugin.
Added the Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency for production-ready features.
Added a Maven profile to configure the docker-maven-plugin for building Docker images.
